message:
feat(mattermost): expand API surface with post management, reactions, and group channels

Client gains six new operations:
- update_post: PATCH an existing post's content
- pin_post / unpin_post: pin/unpin posts to channels
- get_reactions_for_post: retrieve all reactions on a post
- create_group_channel: create group message channels (3+ users)
- Shared post_empty() helper for endpoints with no request body

Types expanded with UpdatePostRequest, CreateGroupChannelRequest, and
supporting structures. Connector implementation wired up to dispatch
these new operations through the FCP operation router with proper
parameter validation and error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
